CustomField.formula: NOT( OR( CONTAINS(LOWER(FirstName) , 'test'), CONTAINS(LOWER(LastName) , 'test'), CONTAINS( Profile.Name , 'System Administrator'), CONTAINS( Profile.Name , 'PT1'), CONTAINS( Profile.Name , 'Customer Room Profile'), CONTAINS( Profile.Name , 'Customer Community User (Custom)'), CONTAINS( Profile.Name , 'Analytics Cloud Integration User'), CONTAINS( Profile.Name , 'ERP Integration Service'), CONTAINS( Profile.Name , 'Chatter'), CONTAINS( Profile.Name , 'Analytics Cloud Security User') ) )
CustomField.label: Show in Activity report
